sentences.target: Je dépose les clés sur la table.
sentences.reading: /ʒə depoz le kle syʁ la tabl/

translations.fr: Je dépose les clés sur la table.
translations.ipa: /ʒə depoz le kle syʁ la tabl/
translations.en: I'm putting the keys on the table.
translations.es: Dejo las llaves sobre la mesa.
translations.de: Ich lege die Schlüssel auf den Tisch.
translations.pt: Eu deixo as chaves em cima da mesa.
translations.he: אני מניח את המפתחות על השולחן.
translations.vi: Tôi đặt chìa khóa lên bàn.
translations.nl: Ik leg de sleutels op tafel.
translations.hi: मैं चाबियाँ मेज़ पर रख रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Αφήνω τα κλειδιά πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.id: Saya menaruh kunci di atas meja.
translations.ja: 鍵をテーブルの上に置きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action of putting something down.
Definite article, plural; introduces the direct object noun 'clés'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'dépose'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'table'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Tu peux déposer le colis à l’accueil.
sentences.reading: /ty pø depoze lə kɔli a lakœj/

translations.fr: Tu peux déposer le colis à l’accueil.
translations.ipa: /ty pø depoze lə kɔli a lakœj/
translations.en: You can drop off the package at reception.
translations.es: Puedes dejar el paquete en recepción.
translations.de: Du kannst das Paket an der Rezeption abgeben.
translations.it: Puoi lasciare il pacco alla reception.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以把包裹交到前台。
translations.yue: 你可以喺前台交個包裹。
translations.ru: Ты можешь оставить посылку на ресепшене.
translations.pt: Você pode deixar o pacote na recepção.
translations.he: אתה יכול להשאיר את החבילה בקבלה.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể gửi gói hàng ở quầy lễ tân.
translations.nl: Je kunt het pakket bij de receptie afgeven.
translations.hi: तुम पैकेज रिसेप्शन पर छोड़ सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να αφήσεις το δέμα στη ρεσεψιόν.
translations.nb: Du kan levere pakken i resepsjonen.
translations.id: Kamu bisa menyerahkan paket ke resepsionis.
translations.sv: Du kan lämna paketet i receptionen.
translations.da: Du kan aflevere pakken i receptionen.
translations.ja: 受付で荷物を預けられます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd person singular; expresses ability/permission and selects an infinitive.
Infinitive main verb complement of 'peux'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'colis'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'déposer'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article elided before a vowel; determines 'accueil'.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition 'à'.

sentences.target: Il dépose sa fille devant l’école.

translations.fr: Il dépose sa fille devant l’école.
translations.en: He drops off his daughter in front of the school.
translations.es: Deja a su hija frente a la escuela.
translations.de: Er setzt seine Tochter vor der Schule ab.
translations.it: Lascia sua figlia davanti alla scuola.
translations.zh-Hans: 他把女儿送到学校门口。
translations.yue: 佢喺學校門口放低佢個女。
translations.ru: Он высаживает свою дочь перед школой.
translations.pt: Ele deixa a filha em frente à escola.
translations.he: הוא מוריד את בתו לפני בית הספר.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đưa con gái đến trước cổng trường.
translations.nl: Hij zet zijn dochter af voor de school.
translations.hu: Kiteszi a lányát az iskola előtt.
translations.hi: वह अपनी बेटी को स्कूल के बाहर उतारता है.
translations.el: Αφήνει την κόρη του μπροστά από το σχολείο.
translations.nb: Han setter datteren av foran skolen.
translations.id: Dia menurunkan putrinya di depan sekolah.
translations.sv: Han släpper av sin dotter framför skolan.
translations.ro: El își lasă fiica în fața școlii.
translations.da: Han sætter sin datter af foran skolen.
translations.ja: 彼は娘を学校の前で降ろします。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; denotes the action of dropping someone off.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person; agrees in gender/number with the noun 'fille' (feminine singular).
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'dépose'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article elided before a vowel; determines 'école'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the preposition 'devant'.

sentences.target: Nous allons déposer un chèque à la banque.
sentences.reading: /nu zalɔ̃ depoze œ̃ ʃɛk a la bɑ̃k/

translations.fr: Nous allons déposer un chèque à la banque.
translations.ipa: /nu zalɔ̃ depoze œ̃ ʃɛk a la bɑ̃k/
translations.en: We're going to deposit a check at the bank.
translations.es: Vamos a depositar un cheque en el banco.
translations.de: Wir werden einen Scheck bei der Bank einzahlen.
translations.it: Andiamo a depositare un assegno in banca.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要去银行存一张支票。
translations.yue: 我哋會去銀行存一張支票。
translations.ru: Мы собираемся положить чек на счёт в банке.
translations.pt: Vamos depositar um cheque no banco.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ đi gửi séc vào ngân hàng.
translations.nl: We gaan een cheque bij de bank storten.
translations.uk: Ми збираємося внести чек у банк.
translations.hu: Elmegyünk a bankba befizetni egy csekket.
translations.hi: हम बैंक में एक चेक जमा करने जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Πάμε να καταθέσουμε μια επιταγή στην τράπεζα.
translations.nb: Vi skal sette inn en sjekk i banken.
translations.id: Kami akan menyetor cek di bank.
translations.sv: Vi ska sätta in en check på banken.
translations.ro: Mergem să depunem un cec la bancă.
translations.da: Vi skal indsætte en check i banken.
translations.ja: 銀行に小切手を預けに行きます。

Auxiliary 'aller', present indicative, 1st person plural; forms the near future (futur proche) with the infinitive.
